entries.title: Employee Handbook 7.1: Workplace Conduct
entries.content: All employees are expected to treat colleagues with respect and professionalism. We maintain a zero-tolerance policy for harassment, discrimination, or bullying of any kind.

entries.title: Employee Handbook 7.2: Dress Code
entries.content: Our office has a 'dress for your day' policy. Business casual is the default, but casual attire is acceptable unless meeting with clients or external partners.

entries.title: Employee Handbook 7.3: Remote Work
entries.content: Employees may work remotely up to two days per week with manager approval. Core hours of 10 AM to 3 PM apply regardless of location.

entries.title: Employee Handbook 7.4: Equipment Usage
entries.content: Company-provided equipment is for business use only. Employees are responsible for securing their devices and immediately reporting any loss or theft to IT Support.

entries.title: Employee Handbook 7.5: Workplace Safety
entries.content: Report any safety hazards or workplace injuries to Facilities immediately. In an emergency, follow the posted evacuation routes and gather at the designated assembly point.

entries.title: Employee Handbook 8.1: Compensation
entries.content: Employees are paid semi-monthly on the 15th and last day of the month via direct deposit. Salary reviews occur annually in Q1.

entries.title: Employee Handbook 8.2: Benefits Overview
entries.content: Full-time employees are eligible for comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance starting on their first day of employment.

entries.title: Employee Handbook 8.3: Paid Time Off (PTO)
entries.content: We offer flexible PTO for salaried employees. Hourly employees accrue 15 days of PTO annually. Sick leave is separate and provides up to 10 days per year.

entries.title: Employee Handbook 8.4: Retirement Plans
entries.content: The company offers a 401(k) plan with a 100% match on the first 4% of employee contributions. Vesting is immediate.

entries.title: Employee Handbook 8.5: Stock Options
entries.content: Eligible employees receive stock options subject to a 4-year vesting schedule with a 1-year cliff.

entries.title: HR Procedure: Employee Onboarding
entries.content: New hires should attend orientation on their first Monday at 9 AM. Managers must submit IT provisioning requests at least 5 business days prior to the start date.

entries.title: HR Procedure: Employee Offboarding
entries.content: Managers must notify HR immediately upon receiving an employee's resignation. IT will revoke access at 5 PM on the final day, and equipment must be returned to Facilities.

entries.title: HR Policy: Performance Reviews
entries.content: Performance reviews are conducted bi-annually in Q1 and Q3. Managers and employees should set OKRs together at the start of each half.

entries.title: Internal Procedure: Expense Reports
entries.content: Submit expense reports via Expensify by the 5th of the following month. Receipts are required for all transactions over $25.

entries.title: Internal Procedure: IT Support Tickets
entries.content: For IT issues, submit a ticket via Jira Service Desk. Urgent issues affecting productivity can be escalated to the #it-help Slack channel.

entries.title: Internal Procedure: Conference Room Booking
entries.content: Book conference rooms through Google Calendar. Rooms left unoccupied 15 minutes after the start time will be released automatically.

entries.title: Internal Procedure: VPN Setup
entries.content: To access internal resources remotely, use the Cisco AnyConnect client. Instructions for installing the profile and MFA setup are on the IT Wiki.

entries.title: Internal Procedure: Badge Access
entries.content: Wear your ID badge visibly at all times in the office. If you lose your badge, report it to Security immediately to have it deactivated and replaced.

entries.title: Company Information: Org Chart
entries.content: The current organizational chart, including executive leadership and department heads, can be viewed dynamically in Workday under the 'Company Directory' tab.

entries.title: HR Policy: Complaint Procedure
entries.content: Employees may file a formal complaint with their HR Business Partner or use the anonymous Ethics Hotline available 24/7 on the intranet portal.
